# github_team_project (Resource)

This resource links a team to a GitHub Projects V2 project.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "github_team_project" "platform" {
  project_id = github_project.planning.id
  team_slug  = "platform"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `project_id` (String) Node ID of the Projects V2 project.
- `team_slug` (String) Team slug.

### Optional

- `organization` (String) Organization login. Defaults to the provider owner.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

## Import

Import uses the project and team GraphQL node IDs separated by a colon:

```shell
terraform import github_team_project.example PVT_example:T_example
```
